question_text: Gamma rays are dangerous to human tissue primarily because they are which of the following?

options.label: B
options.text: Highly energetic with very high frequency

options.label: D
options.text: Able to travel further than other waves

correct_answer: Highly energetic with very high frequency
explanation: Gamma rays have the highest frequency and energy of all electromagnetic waves. This high energy allows them to ionise atoms in living cells, causing damage to DNA and tissue. This is why gamma rays are dangerous to human health.
